idea-plugin.name: VulnSpotter
idea-plugin.description:
A smart vulnerability scanner for your project dependencies. VulnSpotter integrates directly into your IDE to detect security vulnerabilities in your Gradle and Maven dependencies. It leverages the OSV.dev database to provide real-time alerts and detailed remediation advice without leaving your workflow.

Main Features

  • Automated Scanning: Detects vulnerabilities in Gradle and Maven projects automatically.
  • Real-time Alerts: Get instant notifications about security risks in your dependencies.
  • Detailed Reports: View comprehensive vulnerability details, including summaries, severity, and fixed versions.
  • Integrated Tool Window: A dedicated "VulnSpotter" tool window for managing and reviewing scan results.
  • Direct References: One-click access to official security advisories (CVE, GHSA, etc.).
  • Visual Indicators: Clear visual cues for safe vs. vulnerable packages.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Initial Release: First release of VulnSpotter on the JetBrains Marketplace.
  • Gradle & Maven Scanning: Scans project dependencies for known vulnerabilities using the OSV.dev database.
  • Tool Window: Dedicated tool window with vulnerability details and report export to HTML, PDF, and CSV.
  • Layered Architecture: Codebase reorganized into a clean layered architecture.
  • Exclusions: Ignore specific dependencies via a .vulnspotterignore file.

action.description: Scan project dependencies for known vulnerabilities using OSV.dev
